# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# Create an ARM template file named mainTemplate.json that can be used as a starting point by using the below command during resource group creation, if needed replace parameter values accordingly for your case –-baseline or --complete to deploy without DDoS protection and advanced networking features provided in this requirement: arm deployment -f parametersfile_fullparamname
